controls.title: Critical buyer, supplier and admin flows are implemented
controls.nextAction: Keep the authenticated HTTP smoke green for every release candidate.

controls.title: Trust, publication, activation and role invariants are server-side
controls.nextAction: Add positive and negative tests whenever an invariant changes.

controls.title: Schema, migration and deterministic demo seed are reproducible
controls.nextAction: Use a new migration for every schema change and verify it on an empty PostgreSQL database.

controls.title: Quality, integration, dependency and CodeQL gates are automated
controls.nextAction: Keep required checks green and review any exception as a separate risk decision.

controls.title: Moderate transitive PostCSS advisory remains under time-bound review
controls.nextAction: Review by 2026-08-01 and upgrade Next.js/PostCSS when a compatible patched dependency graph is available; do not apply the incompatible npm audit force downgrade.

controls.title: Production hosting, IaC, TLS, rollout, rollback and observe window
controls.nextAction: Select the hosting target, commit its source-of-truth configuration, deploy a staging release, document rollback, then complete an authorized production cutover and observe window.

controls.title: Managed PostgreSQL uses TLS, least privilege, backups and tested restore
controls.nextAction: Provision the production database, define RPO/RTO and retention, run a restore drill and attach timestamped evidence.

controls.title: Production identity supports verification, reset, MFA and session revocation
controls.nextAction: Approve an identity provider and implement email verification, password reset, admin MFA, rotation and device/session revocation; remove demo identities from production.

controls.title: Private object storage, KMS, malware quarantine and retention are live
controls.nextAction: Choose private object storage and malware scanning, implement quarantine-before-clean, encryption, lifecycle and DLP/retention controls, then verify download authorization in staging.

controls.title: Distributed rate limiting, CSP/CSRF, HSTS, WAF and abuse controls
controls.nextAction: Implement Redis or edge rate limiting, high-risk CSRF tokens and nonce-based CSP; configure HSTS/WAF and prove negative paths in staging.

controls.title: Signed payment webhooks, idempotency, reconciliation and ledger
controls.nextAction: Select the Kazakhstan payment/fiscal integration, approve the accounting flow, then implement signed idempotent webhooks, reconciliation, ledger and four-eyes controls.

controls.title: Logs, metrics, traces, alerts and incident response are operational
controls.nextAction: Select the monitoring stack, define SLOs and alerts, publish the incident playbook and verify signal/readback during a staging failure exercise.

controls.title: Secrets are managed and rotated outside repository and runtime images
controls.nextAction: Configure a managed secret store, least-privilege access and a tested rotation procedure for auth, database and integration credentials.

controls.title: Kazakhstan legal texts, privacy impact and retention are approved
controls.nextAction: Obtain signed legal review of offer/privacy/refund templates, complete the privacy impact assessment and approve document retention/deletion periods.

controls.title: Main branch protection and private vulnerability reporting are enabled
controls.nextAction: Enable branch protection or a ruleset requiring Quality and Security checks, prevent force-push/deletion and enable private vulnerability reporting.

controls.title: Android wrapper is signed, tested and points to the approved production origin
controls.nextAction: Approve the production domain, configure protected signing credentials, test the release build on supported Android versions and complete store/distribution review.
